Name: Meadow Update
Description: Updates a record via a Meadow REST endpoint.

SettingsInputs.Name: Endpoint
SettingsInputs.Description: Base URL of the Meadow API

SettingsInputs.Name: DataAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the record data to update

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store the updated record
